app.title: BioOrchestrator
app.subtitle: Predict, compare, and plan — agronomic intelligence backed by trial data from similar environments.

varietyFinder.title: Variety Finder
varietyFinder.subtitle: Best-adapted varieties for your parcel, climate and soil. Ranked by yield from similar trial sites.

parcelStatus.title: Current Parcel Status
parcelStatus.subtitle: Real-time crop stress, water balance, and active alerts from sensor and satellite data.

comparator.title: Crop Comparator
comparator.subtitle: Side-by-side crop comparison for your parcel: yield potential, margin, carbon score.

rotationPlanner.title: Rotation Planner
rotationPlanner.subtitle: Multi-year rotation design with CAP compliance scoring.

waterBudget.title: Water Budget
waterBudget.subtitle: Irrigation needs based on ETc, rainfall forecast, and soil available water.

regenerative.title: Regenerative Sequence
regenerative.subtitle: Cover crop + protein crop sequences with carbon and nitrogen projections.

catalog.title: Crop Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Browse species and varieties with complete agronomic profiles.

climate.title: Climate Map
climate.subtitle: Köppen-Geiger zone explorer with trial site data.

phenology.title: Phenology Browser
phenology.subtitle: Kc, D1, D2, MDS parameters by species, stage, and cultivar.

thermal.title: Thermal Tolerance
thermal.subtitle: Heat and frost damage thresholds per species.

npk.title: NPK Profiles
npk.subtitle: Nutrient absorption rates per phenological stage.

soil.title: Soil Requirements
soil.subtitle: pH, texture, drainage, and salinity per crop.

rotation.title: Rotation Constraints
rotation.subtitle: Minimum intervals between crops from FAO guidelines.

organic.title: Organic Inputs
organic.subtitle: Authorized organic products per crop from EPPO.

pipeline.title: Pipeline
pipeline.subtitle: Data ingestion orchestrator across biodiversity sources.

app.selectParcelPrompt: Select a parcel above to get started

empty.title: Sense dades.
empty.hint: Selecciona filtres i cerca per obtenir dades reals de DAD-IS.

errors.loadBreeds: No s'han pogut carregar les races de DAD-IS.

settings.title: Configuració API DAD-IS
settings.description: L'API DAD-IS de la FAO no es pot usar amb finalitats comercials. Cada usuari ha de proporcionar les seves pròpies credencials obtingudes directament de la FAO.
settings.requestAccess: Sol·licitar accés a l'API de la FAO
settings.tokenPlaceholder: Introdueix el teu token de l'API DAD-IS...

fallback.title: Fonts de dades disponibles (sense DAD-IS)
fallback.description: BioOrchestrator integra múltiples fonts de dades de biodiversitat a través d'IkerKeta disponibles sense credencials DAD-IS:

sources.gbif: Registres globals de ramaderia a través de dades mediades per GBIF
sources.agrovoc: Tesaurus agrícola de la FAO — espècies, races i pràctiques
sources.eppo: Organització europea de protecció vegetal — dades de plagues i malalties
sources.cpvo: Oficina Comunitària de Varietats Vegetals — varietats registrades

phenology.notFound: No s'han trobat paràmetres per a aquesta selecció
phenology.usingDefaults: Usant paràmetres per defecte — sense coincidència exacta per a aquesta selecció

contribute.title: Contribuir paràmetre fenològic
contribute.description: Envia les teves dades de recerca per a revisió científica. La teva contribució serà revisada per un administrador abans d'incorporar-se al conjunt principal de paràmetres.
contribute.author: Autor(s)
contribute.success: Paràmetre enviat per a revisió. Gràcies per la teva contribució.

thermal.title: Thermal Tolerance
thermal.subtitle: Heat and frost stress damage limits for each crop. Data automatically derived from EcoCrop or published in scientific literature.
thermal.empty: No thermal thresholds available for this species. If EcoCrop has temperature data, thresholds can be derived automatically.
thermal.pendingDerivation: {{count}} EcoCrop species have temperature data but thresholds haven't been derived yet.

npk.title: Nutrient Absorption Profile (NPK)
npk.subtitle: Nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium absorption rates per phenological stage. Data from peer-reviewed scientific literature.
npk.totalRow: Total N: {{n}} kg/ha  Total P: {{p}} kg/ha  Total K: {{k}} kg/ha (full season)
npk.empty: No NPK absorption profile for this species.
npk.disclaimer: Absorption rates are indicative. Actual values depend on management, soil, climate, and planting density.

soil.title: Soil Requirements
soil.subtitle: Optimal soil conditions for each crop. Data from EcoCrop GAEZ v4 (FAO).
soil.empty: No soil requirements available for this species.
soil.allPresent: All catalog crops have EcoCrop soil requirements.

organic.title: Insums Orgànics
organic.empty: No s'han trobat insums orgànics autoritzats per a aquest cultiu.
organic.eppoUnavailable: API EPPO no configurada — cerca d'insums orgànics no disponible.

alerts.title: Alertes
alerts.selectPrompt: Selecciona una parcel·la per veure alertes
alerts.empty: Sense alertes actives per a aquesta parcel·la

rotation.title: Rotation Constraints
rotation.subtitle: Minimum intervals between crops to prevent soil pathogens and depletion. Data from FAO guidelines and phytopathological literature.
rotation.empty: No rotation constraints registered for this crop. If no restrictions are known, free rotation is assumed.
rotation.lowCoverage: Only {{count}} rotation rules registered. Most crops lack data.

panel.noCrop: This parcel has no crop assigned. Assign one to see agronomic recommendations.
panel.cropNotInCatalog: The crop '{{crop}}' is not in the catalog. Agronomic data is not available.
panel.none: No agronomic data for this crop. Recommendations cannot be generated without it.
panel.partial: Missing {{n}} data types. Recommendations may be incomplete.
panel.scenarioIncomplete: Both crops have incomplete data. The comparison may be inconclusive.
panel.deprecatedSoilNote: Deprecated data — coming soon from Soil module

disclaimer.text: Les recomanacions es basen en models agronòmics i dades de fonts científiques. No substitueixen el criteri professional. Consulteu el vostre tècnic agrícola local abans de prendre decisions de cultiu.
